task.title: Backtrader backtest + confidence scoring + timeframe fix
task.description: Backtest best 4 strategies with backtrader, fix timeframe bug in backtest_multi_ticker.py, add confidence scoring to live bot for JP225m G

result:
1. backtest_backtrader_g.py: Strategy G (XAUUSDm M15) backtrader backtest → ROI +1813.7%, DD 5.2%, PF 2.70
2. backtest_best4_backtrader.py: Best 4 backtrader backtest → XAGUSDm +478.9%, ETHUSDm +67.4%, BTCUSDTm +6.8%, JP225m +507.2%
3. backtest_multi_ticker.py: Fixed timeframe constants (was using M1/M2 instead of H1/M15)
4. live_bot_4_ticker.py: Added confidence scoring for JP225m G (H1 trend, BB squeeze, volume spike, RSI extreme, London session) with dynamic sizing 1.0x/1.5x/2.0x
notes: BUG FOUND: original backtest_multi_ticker.py used tf_mt5=1 (M1) for H1 strategies, tf_mt5=2 (M2) for M15 — all results from that script are invalid
Live bot command: python ui_dashboard.py (from D:\ALL IN ONE\CODE\TRADING-BOT-V1.0)
Atau run langsung: cd /d D:\ALL IN ONE\CODE\TRADING-BOT-V1.0 && python ui_dashboard.py
Backtrader results confirm all 4 strategies positive ROI with correct timeframes
